description_long: This is a large, rectangular, industrial-style storage locker with a robust red metal exterior and a flat, segmented roof featuring multiple square ventilation panels. The structure is reinforced with horizontal beams visible along the top, suggesting a strong and secure build. The front side includes a single metal door with a handle and a visible locking mechanism, as well as a small access panel and signage. The sides and back are solid, with no windows or additional doors, and the roof panels are arranged in three parallel sections, each with a series of alternating black and white vent covers. The surface is corrugated, providing extra rigidity and a utilitarian appearance. This object is designed for secure storage in environments where durability and weather resistance are important.
description: A large, red, industrial metal storage locker with a flat, segmented roof and a single front door. It features reinforced beams, multiple roof vents, and a corrugated exterior for strength.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main access door, handle, locking mechanism, and signage, with visible roof beams and vent panels.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the three parallel roof sections with alternating black and white vent covers; no doors or handles visible.
description_view_2: Opposite front view, similar to view 0 but mirrored, showing the solid back wall and roof beams.
description_view_3: Rear view similar to view 1, emphasizing the segmented roof and absence of entry points.
